scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/paths -w packages/models -w packages/plugin-sdk -w packages/skills -w packages/projects -w packages/mcp -w packages/plugins -w packages/agent -w packages/channels -w packages/logging -w packages/management -w packages/chat -w packages/mc -w apps/relay -w apps/relay-control-plane -w apps/gateway
scripts.mc:preview: npm run build --workspace=apps/mission-control && npm run preview --workspace=apps/mission-control
scripts.mc:package: npm run build --workspace=apps/mission-control && npm run package --workspace=apps/mission-control
scripts.preflight: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test && npm run models:check
scripts.lint: biome check . && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/mission-control && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/plugin-sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/plugins
scripts.version:sync: V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && for f in packages/*/package.json apps/*/package.json; do node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('$f'));p.version='$V';fs.writeFileSync('$f',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')"; done
